Acquirer Full Name: Japan Industrial Partners (JIP)-led consortium (TBJH Inc., 20+ Japanese corporates incl. Orix, Rohm, Chubu Electric)

Final Resolution Mechanism: TOB succeeded (78.65% tendered); squeeze-out; delisted 20 Dec 2023 after 74 years
